title: The Estee Lauder Companies appoints Sandesh Kasabe as Director – Legal
description: Sandesh Kasabe has joined ELCA Cosmetics, the Indian arm of The Estée Lauder Companies, as Director – Legal, becoming part of the prestige beauty group's India leadership team.Kasabe announced the move on LinkedIn, stating that he has joined ELCA Cosmetics and will be part of its India leadership team. He described the transition into the prestige beauty segment as a “deeply rewarding milestone.”He joins ELCA Cosmetics after a stint at L'Oréal India Private Limited, where he served as Lead Legal
